name: Rotatex
short_description: In the game you control Rotatex is a real cat from another dimension, we have to help him get to the portal in other rooms.
detailed_description:
Fun to play!

Convenient to manage, fun to play!


About the Game

Rotatex is a sloth cat. Rotatex does not like to move independently, but due to the perfect natural round shape and strong bones can easily roll.
You have to turn the room and send the cat nicknamed Rotatex.

Features:

  • Manage the room, but not the cat.
  • Convenient control of the arrows up, down or left, right.
